'''sajolo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:thamnophilid|thamnophilid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-j-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:thamnophilid|thamnophilid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| sajolo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:sæjeleth|sæjeleth]] || [[word:sæjelej|sæjelej]] || [[word:sæjelesh|sæjelesh]] || [[word:sæjele|sæjele]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:sajojoloth|sajojoloth]] || [[word:sajojoloj|sajojoloj]] || [[word:sajojolosh|sajojolosh]] || [[word:sajojolo|sajojolo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:sajoloth|sajoloth]] || [[word:sajoloj|sajoloj]] || [[word:sajolosh|sajolosh]] || [[word:sajolo|sajolo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:sajofloth|sajofloth]] || [[word:sajofloj|sajofloj]] || [[word:sajoflosh|sajoflosh]] || [[word:sajoflof|sajoflof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sajolotho|sajolotho]] || [[word:sajolojo|sajolojo]] || [[word:sajolosho|sajolosho]] || [[word:sajoloko|sajoloko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sajoloth|sajoloth]] || [[word:sajoloj|sajoloj]] || [[word:sajolosh|sajolosh]] || [[word:sajolo|sajolo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sajolothol|sajolothol]] || [[word:sajolojol|sajolojol]] || [[word:sajoloshol|sajoloshol]] || [[word:sajolokol|sajolokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sajolothotho|sajolothotho]] || [[word:sajolojojo|sajolojojo]] || [[word:sajoloshosho|sajoloshosho]] || [[word:sajoloko|sajoloko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sajolothon|sajolothon]] || [[word:sajolojon|sajolojon]] || [[word:sajoloshon|sajoloshon]] || [[word:sajolokon|sajolokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sajolothoro|sajolothoro]] || [[word:sajolojoro|sajolojoro]] || [[word:sajoloshoro|sajoloshoro]] || [[word:sajolokoro|sajolokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
